title: Baby Key Teethers and Keyring Toy – Teething Ring BPA-Free & Sensory Rattle for 6+ Months – Easy Grip, Durable Design – Assorted Teddy & Rabbit Styles – 13cm
features: Thoughtfully shaped for small fingers, this baby key ring is lightweight and easy to grasp, shake, and explore. It encourages independent play while helping babies develop their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.
Designed in cheerful, eye-catching colours that stimulate visual development and curiosity. The vibrant hues encourage babies to reach, touch, and engage through playful interaction.
Made from durable, BPA-free and baby-safe materials, this toy is ideal for everyday play. Parents can feel confident knowing their baby’s toy is non-toxic, strong, and gentle on little mouths.
Available in two adorable styles—teddy bear and rabbit—each with friendly features that appeal to both babies and toddlers. These charming animal shapes spark imagination and make playtime extra fun.

Sized at 13cm x 8cm, these baby key ring toys are for travel, stroller rides, or on-the-go fun. Easy to pack in a diaper bag or car seat organizer, they’re great for busy families. This 2-pack includes one teddy bear and one rabbit design for added variety. Ideal for home, playdates, or outings, they provide comfort, entertainment, and developmental support wherever your little one goes.
description: Baby Key Ring Toy – Assorted Animal Designs – BPA-Free & Easy to Hold Make playtime more engaging with this colourful baby key ring toy, thoughtfully designed for little hands and curious minds. With its lightweight, easy-to-grip shape, babies can comfortably hold, shake, and explore the toy while developing important motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Crafted from durable, BPA-free materials, it’s safe for teething and everyday play. The bright, cheerful colours and playful animal designs—featuring either a teddy or rabbit—encourage babies to grasp, reach, and interact. Whether at home or on the go, it’s a fun and stimulating toy that supports early development in a safe, engaging way. Measuring approximately 13cm x 8cm, and packaged at around 21cm x 12cm, it's ideal for gifting or adding to any baby essentials collection. Suitable for babies aged 6 months and up, this key ring toy makes a wonderful addition to any nursery, nappy bag, or sensory play kit.
